name: jai-formatter
description: Code formatter for the Jai programming language

jai.format.indentCaseContents.description: Indent statements that follow a `case` label inside an if/switch block.

jai.format.spaceAfterComma.description: Normalize comma spacing in code: exactly one space after a comma and none before it (and before semicolons).

jai.format.maxBlankLines.description: Maximum number of consecutive blank lines to keep. Blank lines inside string literals and comments are never collapsed.

jai.format.insertFinalNewline.description: Ensure the file ends with exactly one trailing newline.

jai.format.operatorSpacing.description: Put single spaces around operators in code (:= :: == != <= >= += -= *= /= && || -> << >> = < >). Ambiguous *, +, - (pointers/unary) are left untouched.

jai.format.splitInlineCaseBodies.description: Move a statement written on the same line as a lone `case` label onto its own indented line. Runs of 2+ inline cases are aligned instead when `alignCaseBodies` is on. Whole-document formatting only.

jai.format.alignCaseBodies.description: Keep runs of consecutive `case LABEL; statement;` lines on one line and align the statement column. Takes precedence over splitting for such runs. Whole-document formatting only.

jai.format.alignDeclarations.description: Align the colons (and value `=`) of consecutive declarations at the same indentation. Applies to whole-document formatting only.
